title: Mishima: A Life in Four Chapters

sources.title: mishima-a-life-in-four-chapters_1985
sources.description: Mishima: A Life in Four Chapters (1985)

metadata.Plot: A fictionalized account in four chapters of the life of celebrated Japanese author Yukio Mishima. Three of the segments parallel events in Mishima's life with his novels (The Temple of the Golden Pavilion, Kyoko's House, and Runaway Horses), while the fourth depicts the actual events of the 25th Nov. 1970, "The Last Day".
metadata.Writer: Chieko Schrader, Paul Schrader, Leonard Schrader
metadata.Actors: Ken Ogata, Masayuki Shionoya, Hiroshi Mikami
